headline: Partnership Status: At Risk — Immediate Attention Needed
narrative_paragraph: This Executive Business Review reveals a significant contradiction between the account's technical performance metrics and the current state of the customer relationship. Usage data shows consistent healthy growth, while recent customer feedback and communication patterns indicate elevated dissatisfaction and partnership risk.
key_findings: Strong product adoption across all measured dimensions
NPS verbatim feedback reflects negative experiences not captured in scores
Unresolved operational concerns require structured resolution plan
Renewal risk elevated without immediate intervention
